hero.eyebrow: Hey There | Software Developer | Web3 Builder
hero.description: Welcome to my tranquil place. I am Sital Nagarkoti, a software developer focused on building web applications, decentralized applications, and reliable testing workflows that turn ideas into meaningful products.
quotesOfDay: Build small, ship often, and let feedback shape the next version.
Clean architecture is less about complexity and more about clarity.
Trust grows when systems are secure, transparent, and reliable.
Consistency beats intensity when learning and building products.
The best code is the one your future self can read in one pass.
Strong teams are built on ownership, respect, and clear communication.

expertise.panelBody: I bring a strong work ethic and a collaborative mindset, thriving in teams that value diverse ideas and practical innovation.
expertise.title: Building web apps, dApps, and robust testing-driven systems.
columns: I specialize in software engineering for innovative products, with hands-on experience delivering scalable web applications and decentralized platforms.
My core technical stack includes Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and C++. I continuously refine my craft by staying aligned with modern tools, trends, and engineering practices.

items.title: MongoDB
items.description: Worked with document-based modeling, aggregation pipelines, and practical indexing for web applications.

items.title: PostgreSQL
items.description: Used relational schemas, joins, and query optimization patterns for reliable backend systems.

items.title: Neo4j + Cypher
items.description: Hands-on experience with graph data modeling and basic Cypher queries for relationship-heavy workflows.

items.title: Solana Game Development
items.description: Built Freedom Fighter, a web3 card game experience around ownership-driven gameplay and decentralized interaction.

items.title: Cardano + Solana Exposure
items.description: Worked across blockchain projects including governance-focused Cardano tools and Solana-based game concepts.

items.title: BetterCollected
items.description: A privacy-focused form engine designed to meet strict GDPR and CCPA requirements through zero-knowledge data design and encrypted transit layers.
bulletPoints: Import from Google Forms and Typeform

detail.challenge: Organizations needed secure online forms while staying compliant with strict privacy regulations.
detail.solution: Built privacy-first form workflows with consent-aware data handling, custom branding, and migration tools from existing form providers.
detail.impact: Enabled trust-focused data collection with stronger compliance posture and smoother onboarding for teams moving from legacy form tools.

items.title: Autonomous Agent Testing
items.description: Framework for verifying agent-based governance on Cardano with simulated CIP-1694 voting scenarios.

image.alt: Screenshot of Autonomous Agent Testing dashboard

detail.challenge: Testing decentralized governance behavior required visibility into autonomous agent actions and voting lifecycle events.
detail.solution: Implemented a dashboard-oriented testing platform for CIP-1694 scenarios with agent status tracking, governance logs, and transaction analytics.
detail.impact: Improved confidence in governance-related workflows through repeatable scenario testing and clearer operational observability.

items.title: Split Contract
items.description: Multi-stakeholder agreement protocol allowing transparent distribution across Oracle-validated addresses.
bulletPoints: Built on Cardano smart contract primitives

detail.challenge: Multi-party payout agreements needed transparent, deterministic distribution without manual settlement overhead.
detail.solution: Built split-contract logic to automate proportional allocation across stakeholders with clear rule definitions.
detail.impact: Reduced ambiguity in payout execution and improved reliability of recurring distribution workflows.

items.title: Freedom Fighter
items.description: A blockchain-powered card battle game where players assemble fighters, use strategic abilities, and compete in tactical matches.
bulletPoints: Web3 card game flow with strategy-focused battles
NFT-style ownership experience for in-game characters
Tournament-ready concept with competitive gameplay direction

detail.challenge: Create an engaging game experience that combines strategic battles with real player ownership in a web3 context.
detail.solution: Built Freedom Fighter as a decentralized card-battle concept where squads, abilities, and progression are designed around blockchain-backed game assets.
detail.impact: Demonstrated practical Solana-aligned web3 game development capability and strengthened product thinking across gameplay and blockchain utility.

entries.description: Designing and delivering privacy-focused platforms, Cardano governance tooling, and multi-party smart contract utilities with a strong product mindset.
Collaborated across teams, experimented with testing frameworks and emerging technologies, and strengthened implementation quality through continuous learning.

cta.title: Ready to build your next product together?
